detail.translated:
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 nameif inside
 security-level 85
 ip address 198.18.1.1 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
! MANUAL_REVIEW: Source interface GigabitEthernet1/0/1 mapped to GigabitEthernet0/1. Verify actual interface naming.

interface GigabitEthernet0/2
 nameif outside
 security-level 5
 ip address 198.18.2.1 255.255.255.0
 no shutdown
! MANUAL_REVIEW: Source interface GigabitEthernet2/0/1 mapped to GigabitEthernet0/2. Verify actual interface naming.
object network obj-10.0.0.0-24
 subnet 10.0.0.0 255.255.255.0

object network obj-10.0.1.0-24
 subnet 10.0.1.0 255.255.255.0

nat (inside,outside) source static obj-10.0.0.0-24 obj-10.0.0.0-24
! MANUAL_REVIEW: Source NAT (ACL 2000 -> GROUP1) translation requires ASA NAT pool configuration. Following is PAT-style translation based on available information.
object network NAT_POOL_GROUP1
 range 198.18.10.1 198.18.10.254

! Static server mapping for tcp 198.18.2.100:443 -> 10.0.0.10:443
object network obj-10.0.0.10
 host 10.0.0.10

nat (inside,outside) static obj-10.0.0.10
! Note: Global IP 198.18.2.100 requires separate static mapping
object network obj-global-198.18.2.100
 host 198.18.2.100

nat (inside,outside) static obj-10.0.0.10
! For static port mapping, use:
object network obj-server-443
 host 10.0.0.10

object network obj-global-443
 host 198.18.2.100
nat (inside,outside) static obj-global-443 obj-server-443 service tcp 443 443
access-list ACL_TRUST_TO_UNTRUST extended permit ip 10.0.0.0 255.255.255.0 any
access-list ACL_TRUST_TO_UNTRUST extended permit ip 10.0.1.0 255.255.255.0 any
access-group ACL_TRUST_TO_UNTRUST in interface inside
access-group ACL_TRUST_TO_UNTRUST out interface outside

cases.translated_excerpt:

description inside
ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.0
undo shutdown
quit

set priority 100

quit

description outside
ip address 198.18.1.1 255.255.255.0
undo shutdown

detail.translated:
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0
description inside
ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.0
undo shutdown
quit
firewall zone trust
set priority 100
add interface GigabitEthernet0/0/0
quit
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
description outside
ip address 198.18.1.1 255.255.255.0
undo shutdown
quit
firewall zone untrust
set priority 0
add interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
quit
# MANUAL_REVIEW: object network WEB_SERVER host 10.0.0.10
# object network MAIL_SERVER host 10.0.0.11
# object network OUTSIDE_IPS range 198.18.10.100 198.18.10.110
# INSIDE_NET 需要根据实际内网范围定义
acl number 3001
rule permit source 10.0.0.0 0.0.0.255
quit
nat address-group 1 198.18.10.100 198.18.10.110
# 静态NAT: WEB_SERVER(10.0.0.10) -> outside接口IP tcp 80
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
nat server protocol tcp global interface outside 80 inside 10.0.0.10 80
quit
# 静态NAT: MAIL_SERVER(10.0.0.11) -> outside接口IP tcp 25
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
nat server protocol tcp global interface outside 25 inside 10.0.0.11 25
quit
# 动态NAT: INSIDE_NET -> OUTSIDE_IPS
acl number 3001
rule permit source 10.0.0.0 0.0.0.255
quit
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
nat outbound 3001 address-group 1
quit
acl number 3000
rule 5 permit tcp destination-port eq 80
rule 10 permit tcp destination-port eq 25
quit
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
traffic-filter inbound acl 3000
quit
ip route-static 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0 198.18.1.254

ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.0

quit
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
description outside
ip address 198.18.1.1 255.255.255.0
undo shutdown
quit
firewall zone ...

detail.translated:
stp enable
stp mode mstp
stp region-configuration
 region-name LAB_MSTP
 revision-level 1
 instance 1 vlan 10 20
 instance 2 vlan 30 40
 active region-configuration
quit
stp instance 1 root primary
stp instance 2 root secondary
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/1
 description Trunk-to-Core
 port link-type trunk
 port trunk allow-pass vlan 10 20 30 40 100
 undo shutdown
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/2
 description Access-VLAN10
 port link-type access
 port default vlan 10
 stp edged-port enable
 undo shutdown
interface GigabitEthernet0/0/3
 description Access-VLAN20
 port link-type access
 port default vlan 20
 stp edged-port enable
 undo shutdown
interface Vlanif100
 description Management
 ip address 198.18.100.1 255.255.255.0
 undo shutdown
